title: 🧷 Morphogenic Fields (Symbolic Chaos)
name: Morphogenic Fields (Symbolic Chaos)
what_it_is: A theory from Rupert Sheldrake—form and pattern emerge from invisible informational fields. Not formal math, but excellent mythopoetic logic.
how_to_use: she moves through a morphogenic field—her shape shimmering with ancestral pattern
his body stabilizes within a symbolic field—chaos resolves into sacred form
animation_behavior: Forms flicker and stabilize, shape emerges from vibrating field, pattern appears from chaos
